title: Syndeo-Complex
description:
Syndeo-Complex is a first-person shooter. It is inspired by games like Half-Life and Doom (1993). You will have to explore twisting levels, fight enemies and solve puzzles. At the end of each level, you will have to defeat tougher enemies: the Nekron Kyttaron. This will allow you to progress in the game and unlock the characters' stories.

--

Here is the story so far

You are Dyo Deka, a Scythe Chaser, a half-human, half-machine being.
You work for the mega-corporation Syndeo, the robot police.

Your new targets are the Nekron Kyttaron, five corrupted machines with monstrous appearances.
However, Enas Miden, commander of Prophet 60091, will use his army and influence against you.

Your objectives are to neutralize the Nekron Kyttaron and then destroy the Prophet 60091 using the SH10151 orbital cannon.

You will not be alone, your virtual experience will be recalled in a new body after each reanimation.

--

The game includes:

• 1 mysterious hub that connects all levels

• 5 levels, each with its own environment 

• 5 bosses called Nekron Kyttaron 

• 7 weapons including a pistol, an assault rifle, a missile launcher, a shotgun, etc 

• 16 enemies and characters with their own stories to unlock 

• 3 drugs

• 12 music tracks (50 minutes), downloadable as free DLC

• Philosophical dialogues

• Enigmatic storyline
description_short: In Syndeo-Complex you will explore five different environments connected by a hub. Each level has its own mechanics, weapons, enemies and bosses. The Keli, small droids, will (probably) guide you in your quest.
